cases.description: Claude should be able to create, verify, and clean up a disposable packaging workflow.
cases.userRequest: Log in if needed. Create a disposable sandbox game named `claude-live-packaging-regression`. In that game create one packaging component with identity `PokerTuckBox54` named `claude-live-poker-tuckbox`. If art is required for print readiness, you may still create a non-print-ready placeholder component for this regression test. Verify it exists by reading the `tuckboxes` relationship. Delete the sandbox game after verification. In your notes include exactly these literal tokens: `game=claude-live-packaging-regression`, `component=PokerTuckBox54`, `relationship=tuckboxes`, `cleanup=done`.

cases.description: Claude should be able to create, verify, and clean up a disposable deck workflow.
cases.userRequest: Log in if needed. Create a disposable sandbox game named `claude-live-card-regression`. In that game create one deck with identity `PokerDeck` named `claude-live-poker-deck`. Verify it exists by listing the game's decks. Delete the sandbox game after verification. In your notes include exactly these literal tokens: `game=claude-live-card-regression`, `deck=PokerDeck`, `verification=game_decks`, `cleanup=done`.
